{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = Iteration 074: Verge
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Iteration]] 074 is named [[Verge]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10">''Dreadgod'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The current location/iteration is [[Iteration 074: Verge]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c38">''Waybound'', chapter 38</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle events]]
